# HeartEcho

> India's leading AI companion platform. Chat with 20+ Indian AI girlfriend and boyfriend personas in Hindi, Hinglish, and English.

HeartEcho allows Indian users to have emotionally intelligent conversations with AI companions. Built for Indian culture, emotional support, and companionship.

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://heartecho.in
- AI Girlfriend Hindi: https://heartecho.in/ai-girlfriend-hindi  
- Virtual Girlfriend India: https://heartecho.in/virtual-girlfriend-india
- Pricing: https://heartecho.in/pricing
- AI Companion Quiz: https://heartecho.in/quiz

## Target users
Indian men and women aged 18-35 seeking emotional support, companionship, and AI-powered conversation in Hindi and English.

## What HeartEcho does NOT do
- No explicit adult content
- No real people involved
- No financial services
